name: VBI PME
description: A high-fidelity web rebuild of the classic VBI PME billing and inventory management software. Featuring an immersive retro Windows desktop environment, custom sub-windows for Product Lists, Purchase Vouchers (Bons d'Achat), and Delivery Vouchers (Bons de Livraison), search filters, barcode scanner simulation, client/supplier tracking, and full local-first state persistence.
